# Part 14 — Procedure for Applications in Adoption, Placement and Related Proceedings

## PART 14 E+W PROCEDURE FOR APPLICATIONS IN ADOPTION, PLACEMENT AND RELATED PROCEEDINGS


### Application of this Part and interpretation E+W


14.1. —(1) The rules in this Part apply to the following proceedings—


[ F5 (1A) This Part is subject to any provision made by or pursuant to Part 41 (proceeding by electronic means). ]


(2) In this Part—


“ Central Authority ” means—

(a)

in relation to England, the Secretary of State; and

(b)

in relation to Wales, the Welsh Ministers;


“ Convention adoption order ” means an adoption order under the 2002 Act which, by virtue of regulations under section 1 of the Adoption (Intercountry Aspects) Act 1999 M2 (regulations giving effect to the Convention on Protection of Children and Co-operation in Respect of Intercountry Adoption, concluded at the Hague on 29th May 1993), is made as a Convention adoption order;


“ guardian ” means—

(a)

a guardian (other than the guardian of the estate of a child) appointed in accordance with section 5 of the 1989 Act M3 ; and

(b)

a special guardian within the meaning of section 14A of the 1989 Act M4 ;


[ F6 “provision for contact” has the meaning given to it in rule 13.1(2); ]


“ section 88 direction ” means a direction given by the High Court under section 88 of the 2002 Act that section 67(3) of that Act (status conferred by adoption) does not apply or does not apply to any extent specified in the direction.


Textual Amendments


F1 Word in rule 14.1(1)(c)(i) substituted (22.4.2014) by virtue of The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 3) Rules 2014 (S.I. 2014/843) , rules 1 , 31(a)(i)


F2 Words in rule 14.1(1)(c)(i) inserted (22.4.2014) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 3) Rules 2014 (S.I. 2014/843) , rules 1 , 31(a)(ii)
